Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mad King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King is a Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King's aura is a blazing, implacable wave of chaos like magma.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King wears armor carved from the physical manifestation of a Class One Fiend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Mad King struck three more times after removing the first world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Mad King leads a charge with a false Scythe.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman was given the title of the Mad King by the Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King is an exception among the Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Mad King's workings can cast Makiel through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Mad King exploited an opening to cast a wave of chaotic many-colored fire across the planet.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Mad King manifests into reality holding a black Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Mad King contains the Fiend Oth’kimeth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Mad King is a character who commands with his word.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Mad King did not tremble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Mad King sought to strike a blow and topple the pillars of Heaven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Mad King battles the Judges of the Abidan Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Mad King is an old enemy of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Mad King fled during the strike on the shroud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Mad King made the Origin Shroud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Mad King is Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Mad King uses a scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — The Mad King is a figure whose arrival signifies something has gone terribly wrong.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The Mad King copied Ozriel's weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The Mad King is capable of creating deadly weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Mad King is a figure whose relationship Ozriel intended to strain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Mad King warps Fate by his very presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Mad King intends to ride to war once more.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The Mad King may have left a Vroshir behind to move undetected.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Mad King is a character Suriel intends to meet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Mad King was engaged in a fight with two Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel must be prepared to face the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — A fragment of the Mad King is floating in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The true self of the Mad King is fighting Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — The Mad King is a combatant fighting Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Mad King uses a savage technique to defend against Eithan's strikes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Mad King is a character whose body was half-erased by the Scythe of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Mad King is a figure used as a reason for the Abidan's suspicion of the Reapers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Mad King made promises to Li Markuth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth cursed the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Mad King is an intruder in bone armor.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Mad King's actions caused damage to worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Vall lost an eye in a battle with the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Mad King was driven away.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
